SEARCH

モジュール org.commonutils

module org.commonutils
Small JDK 21+ utility library. The public API is curated: it favors high-frequency, broadly useful helpers over exhaustive coverage of every category, and it is not limited to any single domain—the set of packages and types may grow over time. Implementations aim to be safe and fast and depend on no third-party libraries; this module requires only java.base.

Depend on this module

module-info.java of the consumer should declare requires org.commonutils;. This module depends only on java.base.

Exported packages

org.commonutils.lang
String, number, and Objects-aligned helpers (StringSupport, NumberSupport, ObjectSupport).
org.commonutils.util
Collection and Map helpers (CollectionSupport, MapSupport).
org.commonutils.annotation
Contract markers: Nullable, NonNull, NonNegative, Positive.
org.commonutils.id
IdGenerator, UuidV4IdGenerator, UuidV7, UuidV7IdGenerator (RFC 4122 v4 and RFC 9562 v7 UUIDs), Ulid / UlidIdGenerator (ULID strings), and NanoIdGenerator (URL-safe string IDs).

Non-exported packages (for example implementation details of validation) are not part of the supported surface when using the module path.

  • パッケージ

    エクスポート
    パッケージ
    説明
    org.commonutils.annotation
    Marker annotations documenting nullability and numeric ranges on this library's public API.
    org.commonutils.id
    Identifier generators with a shared IdGenerator contract.
    org.commonutils.lang
    Language-level helpers: strings, character sequences, numeric strings, and wrappers aligned with Objects.
    org.commonutils.util
    Helpers for Collection and Map: null-safe emptiness, sizing, membership, ordered endpoints, and typed map reads with defaults.
